title: IIIF Presentation 3.0 Manifest (minimal)
description: A minimal, growable schema for the required top-level structure of an IIIF Presentation API 3.0 Manifest. Extend this as Loupe checks more of the spec.

@context.description: Must reference the IIIF Presentation 3 context; may be a single string or an array of strings.

id.description: The URI that identifies this Manifest.

label.description: A language map: keys are language codes (or 'none'), values are arrays of strings.

items.description: The list of Canvases that make up the Manifest.
